key_trends: Enterprise-led revenue growth: 68% share of 8.8M CNY, NPS 55, weekly revenue trending upward (2.1→2.4M CNY)
Customer satisfaction improving (NPS 38→42) but enterprise onboarding remains 6-week bottleneck
Competitive pressure from Competitor B's custom dashboard release directly targeting our #1 pain point
Churn stable at 1.6% with NRR 104% indicating healthy expansion revenue

data_inconsistencies.claim: Partner channel represents 35% of total Q4 revenue
data_inconsistencies.conflict: Partner revenue 1.74M CNY / total revenue 8.8M CNY = 19.8%, not 35%. Mathematical contradiction between claimed share percentage and absolute revenue figures.

top_risks: Partner budget decisions (bonuses, headcount) based on inflated 35% claim vs actual ~19.8% — requires finance reconciliation
Competitor B custom dashboards directly targeting our #1 enterprise pain point (68% revenue exposure)
6-week enterprise onboarding limiting growth velocity for net-new accounts
recommended_actions: Table partner incentive decisions pending finance reconciliation — resolve 35% vs 19.8% discrepancy first
Accelerate custom dashboard development — counter Competitor B, address #1 enterprise pain point
Reduce enterprise onboarding from 6 weeks to 4 weeks — improve time-to-revenue for new accounts
